title: Silique RNA Extraction
author: Alex Rajewski
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.nzfdf3n
materials: Discard the supernatant and dry the pellet.
Discard the supernatant and dry the RNA pellet.

steps.title: Add three stainless steel BBs to...
steps.instruction: Add three stainless steel BBs to each 2-mL tube with tissue in liquid nitrogen and homogenize the samples in a Retsch mixer mill for 60 seconds at 25 Hz. (Retsch MM400, 20.745.0001, https://s3.amazonaws.com/pr-journal/xk9jive.png )

steps.title: After brief mixing, vortex vigorously for...
steps.instruction: After brief mixing, vortex vigorously for 5 min, and spin for 5 min at 11 000×g. 00:05:00, Vortex 00:05:00, Spin at 11,000g

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a new...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a new 2-mL Eppendorf tube, add 0.5 volume of chloroform (~500μL) and vortex for 2 min. undetermined, Chloroform 00:02:00, Vortex

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5 volume of acid phenol (water-saturated; ~500μL) and vortex for another 2 min. undetermined, Acid Phenol 00:02:00, Vortex

steps.title: Centrifuge at 11,000g for 15 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 11,000g for 15 min. 00:15:00, Spin at 11,000g

steps.title: Carefully remove the upper aqueous phase...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the upper aqueous phase (avoiding the interface) to a new RNase-free 2-mL Eppendorf tube, and add 90μL 3 M sodium acetate (pH 5.2) and 600μL isopropanol. Mix briefly. undetermined, 3M Sodium Acetate undetermined, Isopropanol

steps.title: Incubate at room temp for 10...
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temp for 10 min then spin at 11,000g for 10 min. 00:10:00, Incubation 00:10:00, Spin at 11,000g

steps.title: Discard the upper aqueous phase and...
steps.instruction: Discard the upper aqueous phase and wash the pellet with 1 mL 75% ethanol (RNase-free). undetermined, 75% Ethanol

steps.title: Spin at 11,000g for 10 min, and discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Spin at 11,000g for 10 min, and discard the supernatant. Air dry the pellet briefly (<5 min). 00:10:00, Spin at 11,000g 00:05:00, Air dry

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in1 mL TRIzol...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in1 mL TRIzol reagent and vortex until dissolved. undetermined, TRIzol

steps.title: Add 200µL chloroform and mix by shaking vigorously for 15s
steps.instruction: Add 200µL chloroform and mix by shaking vigorously for 15s. undetermined, Chloroform 00:00:15, Vortex

steps.title: Incubate for 2–3 min, then centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 2–3 min, then centrifuge at 11,000g at 4°C for 15 min. 00:02:00, Incubation 00:15:00, Spin at 11,000g and 4ºC

steps.title: Transfer the upper aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper aqueous phase to a new well-labeled RNase-free 1.5-mL Eppendorf tube containing 500μL isopropanol. Mix, then incubate for 10 min. This is the tube that will be used for final storage. A white mat may form in the aqueous phase, and should also be transferred. undetermined, Isopropanol 00:10:00, Incubation

steps.title: Spin at 11 000×g at 4°C...
steps.instruction: Spin at 11 000×g at 4°C for 15 min 00:15:00, Spin at 11,000g and 4ºC

steps.title: Dissolve the RNA pellet in 100μL DEPC-treated, sterilized ddH2O
steps.instruction: Dissolve the RNA pellet in 100μL DEPC-treated, sterilized ddH2O. undetermined, RNase-free Water

steps.title: Add 10μL DEPC-treated 3 M sodium acetate (pH 5
steps.instruction: Add 10μL DEPC-treated 3 M sodium acetate (pH 5.2) and 250μL RNase-free 100% ethanol and mix. undetermined, 3M Sodium Acetate undetermined, Absolute Ethanol

steps.title: Incubate for 20 min, then spin...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 20 min, then spin at 11,000g at 4°C for 15 min. 00:20:00, Incubation 00:15:00, Spin at 11,000g and 4ºC

steps.title: Wash the pellet with 1
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet with 1.2 mL 75% ethanol, then spin at 11,000g at 4°C for 10 min. undetermined, 75% Ethanol 00:10:00, Spin at 11,000g and 4ºC

steps.title: Dissolve the pellet in 50μL DEPC-treated,...
steps.instruction: Dissolve the pellet in 50μL DEPC-treated, sterilized ddH2O, and store at – 80°C. undetermined, RNase-free Water

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.2mL of Extraction Buffer (with βME or DTT added) to the frozen tissue and mix. undetermined, Extraction buffer

steps.title: Wash the pellet with 1
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet with 1.2 mL 75% ethanol RNase-free), and spin at 11 000×g at 4°C for 10 min. undetermined, 75% Ethanol 00:10:00, Spin at 11,000g and 4ºC
